description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, slightly bulging body constructed from vertical wooden staves. The barrel is reinforced by four black metal hoops, two near the top and two near the bottom, which help maintain its structural integrity. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish, showing natural grain patterns and a slightly weathered appearance. On one side, there is a faded white logo or marking, suggesting it may have been used for storage or transport of goods, possibly in a brewery or distillery. The top and bottom are flat and made of the same wood as the sides, with no visible handles or spouts. The overall look is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description: A robust, dark brown wooden barrel with black metal hoops and a faded white logo on one side. The surface is weathered, and the barrel is reinforced for durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faded white logo on the wooden surface and all four black metal hoops.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible markings, displaying the wood grain and metal hoops clearly.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, with uninterrupted wood and metal bands.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the plain wooden surface and metal hoops, with no visible markings.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: faded white logo/text on one side
